name: kerala-election-live-dashboard
description: Live Kerala Assembly Election 2026 results dashboard backed by official ECI result pages.

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @kerala-election/shared && npm run dev:backend
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build --workspace @kerala-election/shared && npm run dev --workspace @kerala-election/backend
scripts.dev:frontend: npm run build --workspace @kerala-election/shared && npm run dev --workspace @kerala-election/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @kerala-election/shared && npm run build --workspace @kerala-election/backend && npm run build --workspace @kerala-election/frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build --workspace @kerala-election/shared && npm run build --workspace @kerala-election/backend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build --workspace @kerala-election/shared && npm run build --workspace @kerala-election/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @kerala-election/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @kerala-election/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @kerala-election/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @kerala-election/backend && npm run lint --workspace @kerala-election/frontend
